input.command:
curl -s "https://public.zapper.xyz/graphql" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "x-zapper-api-key: 06112e77-d5df-4c51-8f86-707bc1a842c0" \
  -d '{"query":"query Portfolio($addresses: [Address!]!) { portfolio(addresses: $addresses) { totals { total } tokenBalances { totalBalanceUSD byToken(first: 100) { edges { node { name symbol price tokenAddress imgUrl1V2 balance balanceUSD network } } } } } }", "variables": {"addresses": ["0xd8dA6BF26964aF9D7eEd9e03E53415D37aA96045"]}}' 2>&1 | python3 -c "import sys, json; print(json.dumps(json.load(sys.stdin), indent=2))" | head -200
